description: Detailed information about a Bulk API 2.0 ingest job, including its current state and processing statistics.
name: IngestJobInfo

id.description: The unique identifier of the ingest job.

operation.description: The DML operation being performed by this job.

object.description: The API name of the SObject type being processed.

state.description: The current state of a Bulk API 2.0 job, indicating where it is in its lifecycle.

createdDate.description: The date and time the job was created, in ISO 8601 format.

systemModstamp.description: The date and time the job was last modified, in ISO 8601 format.

numberRecordsProcessed.description: The number of records processed so far. Updated after processing completes.

numberRecordsFailed.description: The number of records that failed during processing.

errorMessage.description: Error message if the job reached the Failed state. Describes the reason for failure.

contentType.description: The content type of the data uploaded to this job.

lineEnding.description: The line ending used in the uploaded data.

columnDelimiter.description: The column delimiter used in the uploaded data.

externalIdFieldName.description: The external ID field name used for upsert operations. Only present for upsert jobs.

jobType.description: The job type (V2Ingest for Bulk API 2.0 ingest jobs).

createdById.description: The Salesforce user ID of the user who created the job.

apiVersion.description: The API version used to create the job.
